product.goal: Package DD Hermes as a GitHub-publishable V1 repository with public-facing docs, MIT licensing, and release assets.
product.user_value: A first-time GitHub reader can understand what DD Hermes is, how to start, and how to validate it without relying on chat history.
non_goals: Do not publish V2 drafts as part of the V1 promise.
Do not include unrelated worktree changes.
Do not hardcode live runtime truth into the landing page.

review_findings: The public landing surface is now English-first while preserving deeper Chinese operational materials where needed.
MIT licensing, contributor guidance, quickstart documentation, and both long and short release assets are present as a coherent public package.
The V1 publish scope remains bounded and excludes unrelated mixed-worktree changes while restoring the missing no-execution state fixtures required by schema smoke.

planned_steps: rg -n '/Volumes|file://' README.md CONTRIBUTING.md docs/github-release-v1.md docs/quickstart.md docs/releases/*.md
verified_steps: rg -n '/Volumes|file://' README.md CONTRIBUTING.md docs/github-release-v1.md docs/quickstart.md docs/releases/*.md

notes.text: english-first public docs, short release copy, and release state trace were added for GitHub publish packaging
restored missing no-execution state fixtures so schema smoke passes in this publish branch
